summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 8 features: SearchBar with service tabs and date pickers, Admin metrics dashboard with charts, SVG logo across app, and pet sizes on provider cards/profiles. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.

issues: Google Maps API error: RefererNotAllowedMapError - domain not authorized. This is a Google API key configuration issue, not code issue.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/providers - returns 5 providers from MongoDB Atlas
Backend: GET /api/providers - services contain pet_sizes array with valid values (pequeno, mediano, grande)
Backend: GET /api/providers - services have correct structure (service_type, price_from)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - admin login returns JWT token and role=admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - returns 6 months of data with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - each month has users, providers, subscriptions, reviews counts
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns summary statistics
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=alojamiento - filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=guarderia - filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=paseo - filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans - returns active plans
Frontend: Home page renders with SearchBar component
Frontend: SearchBar has 3 service tabs (Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo)
Frontend: Service tabs change active styling on click
Frontend: Date picker trigger appears in SearchBar
Frontend: SVG logo (/ucan-logo.svg) appears in Navbar
Frontend: Search page has 4 service tabs (Todos, Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo)
Frontend: Search page date picker appears when service tab selected
Frontend: Provider cards show pet_sizes badges (Pequeno, Mediano, Grande)
Frontend: Login page uses SVG logo
Frontend: Register page uses SVG logo
Frontend: Navbar 'Iniciar Sesion' link works
Frontend: Navbar 'Registrarse' link works
Frontend: Admin panel has Metricas tab
Frontend: Admin Metricas tab shows MetricsChart with 6-month bar chart
Frontend: Admin Metricas tab shows chart legend (Usuarios, Proveedores, Suscripciones, Resenas)
Frontend: Admin Metricas tab shows Resumen and Proveedores summary cards
Frontend: Provider profile page shows pet_sizes per service
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps API key needs domain authorization for https://care-directory-form.preview.emergentagent.com - not a code issue, requires Google Cloud Console configuration
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: 5 providers with services containing pet_sizes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features tested: (1) SearchBar component on Home and Search pages with 3 service tabs (Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo) and date pickers - range mode for alojamiento, multi-select for others. (2) Admin panel has Metricas tab showing MetricsChart component with 6-month bar chart displaying users/providers/subscriptions/reviews counts. (3) SVG logo at /ucan-logo.svg displays on Navbar, Login, and Register pages. (4) Pet sizes (pequeno, mediano, grande) displayed on provider cards in Search page and on Provider profile services. Admin credentials: admin@ucan.cl / admin123. All MongoDB Atlas data persisted.

features_tested.searchbar_service_tabs: Home and Search pages have Alojamiento/Guarderia/Paseo tabs that change active state
features_tested.searchbar_date_pickers: Date picker with range mode (alojamiento) or multiple mode (guarderia/paseo)
features_tested.admin_metrics_chart: MetricsChart component displays 6-month bar chart with 4 data series
features_tested.svg_logo: ucan-logo.svg displayed in Navbar, Login, and Register pages
features_tested.pet_sizes_cards: Provider cards in Search page show pet_sizes badges
features_tested.pet_sizes_profile: Provider profile shows pet_sizes per service
features_tested.pet_sizes_api: GET /api/providers returns services with pet_sizes array
